text.cn: 共享單車包圍湖岸。一對情侶跑來：『幫我們按快門！……啊也可以合影收費嗎？』
text.en: Shared bikes siege the shore. A couple runs over: 'Press the shutter! …Can we also pay for a photo with you?'

text.cn: 沿湖走半圈，拒絕變成商品。
text.en: Walk half the shore; refuse becoming a product.

text.cn: 💰 幫按快門 + 合影收費（西湖限定奇妙生意）。
text.en: 💰 Shutter help + paid group photo (West Lake weird business).
